title: William Lee
content:
People.ContactEmail wlee@mccarthy.ca
- Osgoode Hall Law School
William Lee is a Partner in the firm’s Business Law Group and Financial Services Group in Toronto.  He maintains an active corporate practice specializing in banking and finance transactions. Will advises and represents domestic and international financial institutions, non-bank lenders and alternative credit providers, pension funds, private equity sponsors, other financial sponsors and corporate borrowers on all aspects of debt financing, including structured and acquisition financings, asset-based lending, subordinated and mezzanine financings, subscription facilities and NAV financings, and recapitalization transactions and financial restructurings.
Clients value and appreciate Will’s pragmatic problem-solving approach, his strategic legal insights, and his comprehensive knowledge of the credit markets and the financial services sector.
Will co-leads the firm’s South Korea Practice and actively participates in several Korean Canadian professional organizations and associations.

#### Will’s most recent mandates include:
- Advising Brookfield Infrastructure in its successful contested takeover bid for Inter Pipeline Ltd. for approximately $15 billion and related debt financings.
- Advising Brookfield Asset Management in connection with its £4.08 billion acquisition of HomeServe.
- Advising Endeavour Mining Corporation in connection with the acquisition of Teranga Gold Corporation for $2.44 billion.
- Advising Rinto Tinto in connection with its US$3.3 billion acquisition of Turquoise Hill Resources.
- Advising Newcrest Mining on its US$460 million acquisition from Orion and Blackstone of gold prepay and silver stream facilities and offtake over Lundin Gold’s Fruta del Norte mine in Ecuador.
- Advising Summit Industrial Income REIT in connection with the $5.9 billion thereof by a joint venture between GIC and Dream Industrial REIT.
- Advising Bank of Montreal and a syndicate of lenders in the $2 billion term and revolving credit facilities provided to Maple Leaf Foods Inc.;
- Advising The Bank of Nova Scotia , National Bank of Canada , Canadian Imperial Bank of Commerce and other arrangers and lenders in connection with $2.4 billion acquisition by Brookfield Business Partners, L.P. of Genworth MI Canada Inc.
- Advising National Bank of Canada , Canadian Imperial Bank of Commerce and a syndicate of senior lenders in connection with the refinancing of $335 million senior secured revolving facility and recapitalization plan of Just Energy Group Inc.
- Advising Credit Suisse AG, Cayman Islands Branch and a syndicate of lenders in connection with the financing of the acquisition by Stonepeak Infrastructure Partners of Xplornet Communications Inc.
- Advising National Bank of Canada and a syndicate of lenders in connection with $268 million financing of Golden South Wind energy facility.
- Advising Instar Asset Management in connection with $90 million green loan credit facilities provided by Royal Bank of Canada, as administrative agent, and a syndicate of lenders.
- Advising The Hertz Corporation and certain of its subsidiaries in connection with US$1.65 billion debtor-in-possession (DIP) financing as part of Hertz’s global restructuring effort under Chapter 11 of the U.S. Bankruptcy Code.
Will is a member of the Law Society of Ontario, the Ontario Bar Association, the Canadian Bar Association, the Korean Canadian Lawyers Association and the International Association of Korean Lawyers.
